user.title: Select Keypad
user.description: Found {count} keypad(s) on your Lutron bridge. Select the one you want to configure.

confirm.title: Confirm Keypad

error.lutron_not_loaded: The Lutron Caséta integration is not loaded. Set it up first.
error.device_not_found: Selected device could not be found. Try again.

abort.lutron_not_loaded: The Lutron Caséta integration must be set up before adding keypads.

init.title: Configure Buttons — {keypad_name}
init.description:
Keypad type: **{keypad_type}**

Select a button to configure its action, or choose **Save & Close** when finished.

button.title: Button {button_number}
button.description:
**Action Target** examples by type:
- `stateful_scene` / `ha_scene` → `scene.living_room_movie`
- `automation` → `automation.good_night`
- `script` → `script.party_mode`
- `entity_toggle` → `light.lamp` or `light.lamp, fan.ceiling`
- `cover_cycle` → `cover.living_room_shade`
- `light_cycle_dim` → `light.cans, light.accent`

`LED Entity` and `Scene Group` only apply to `stateful_scene`.
